title: [spec-compliance] EDHOC KDF labels use strings instead of integers
description: rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:328-340 uses string labels "7","10" etc for edhoc_kdf (CBOR tstr) but RFC 9528 §4.1.2 + spec/06-security.md:347-349 + Python ref + test vectors require integer labels (0x07 etc). Breaks OSCORE key derivation. See explore task ses_07076286effeyM9Bu5Zr6pa6rl
